message:
fix: handle bv not installed case in drift detection tests

Update TestCheckDrift_EarlyValidation to conditionally check error
messages based on whether bv is installed.

The problem:
- Tests assumed bv was always installed
- When bv is not installed, the error message is "bv not installed"
  instead of "project directory does not exist" or "no .beads directory"
- Tests would fail in environments without bv installed

The fix:
- Use IsInstalled() to detect if bv is available
- If installed: Expect detailed path-based error messages
- If not installed: Expect "bv not installed" message

This allows the tests to pass in CI environments where bv may not
be present while still validating the correct behavior when it is.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
